National Institute of Business Management is a private institute. National Institute of Business Management offers a total of 3 courses at PG levels. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM in both Full Time and Part Time modes. National Institute of Business Management fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 6,500 to 14,700. It offers courses, in stream such as Business & Management Studies. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

National Institute of Business Management offers diverse programmes at PG level in Full Time and Part Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Business & Management Studies. At the PG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM. National Institute of Business Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 6,500 to 14,700.

reviews_list.review_title: Very good infrastructure and faculty members are supportive.

review_content.Placements: The placement system in this department of the college is fair and supportive. Not all, but 80 percent of students are placed after their course. The top recruiting companies are Just Dial, IndiaMART, Wipro, Girnar Industries, etc. There are no internships provided after any course, and the package which actual students received is 1.5 to 2.5 average.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus provides hostel facilities for girls as well as boys. And the hostel facilitates with 2-bed and 4-bed, AC and non-AC. It provides the option to live in a hostel with these facilities. The hostel mess is good compared to others in that area, and the hostel also provides the sports ground and sports facility to their students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is almost 70 to 80 percent, with placements in top-rated companies. In the past, the university has given placements to 3000+ students, and it has large scope in fields like commerce, science, and marketing. All courses are two or three years long.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university's infrastructure is so giant that all kinds of services can be availed in one place. Additionally, there is a branch of Syndicate Bank on campus, so there are no worries about banking for hostel students. The library has enough space to accommodate 150 students at a time.

review_summary.college_name: Noble University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Noble University is a success for career.

content.Placements: I am a B.Com student and my job placement is based on my percentage, skills and experience. My field is very important and the average salary is 20,000 for freshers. You can also achieve experience, which will increase your salary along with your consistency for the job.
content.Infrastructure: Noble University has a very large infrastructure in Junagadh. The infrastructure facilities like canteen, transportation, hospital and hostels are absolutely good. They provide the best quality food in the canteen and other facilities like the sports ground are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Noble University, Junagadh review, 2017-2020.

content.Placements: I was studying for a Diploma in Computer Engineering, as I mentioned earlier. In our college, students were around 60-70 in the first year. As the year passed, the number reduced due to exams. Students leave the college due to difficulty in the course and many other reasons. By the final year, only about 45 students remained, which is half of the first-year strength. The lowest package offered was around 1.2 LPA by less popular companies. Around 18-20 students received job offers from companies. the roles offered by our course were not very good until now.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very good infrastructure and faculty members are supportive.

content.Placements: The placement system in this department of the college is fair and supportive. Not all, but 80 percent of students are placed after their course. The top recruiting companies are Just Dial, IndiaMART, Wipro, Girnar Industries, etc. There are no internships provided after any course, and the package which actual students received is 1.5 to 2.5 average.
content.Infrastructure: The campus provides hostel facilities for girls as well as boys. And the hostel facilitates with 2-bed and 4-bed, AC and non-AC. It provides the option to live in a hostel with these facilities. The hostel mess is good compared to others in that area, and the hostel also provides the sports ground and sports facility to their students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review about noble campus.

content.Placements: The placement rate is almost 70 to 80 percent, with placements in top-rated companies. In the past, the university has given placements to 3000+ students, and it has large scope in fields like commerce, science, and marketing. All courses are two or three years long.
content.Infrastructure: The university's infrastructure is so giant that all kinds of services can be availed in one place. Additionally, there is a branch of Syndicate Bank on campus, so there are no worries about banking for hostel students. The library has enough space to accommodate 150 students at a time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com with Chartered Accountancy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: RP's review on Noble University.

content.Placements: The placements in my course are pretty high; about 85 to 90 percent of students get placed. The minimum package offered was 6 lakh per annum, and the highest package was about 24 or 30 lakh per annum last year to our seniors. Top companies like TCS, Reliance, and some other local companies also came for placements, with roles like accounts manager and sales manager being the top offers.
content.Infrastructure: The classes, library, grounds for sports, and labs for science students are great and among the best in the city. The classrooms are large and filled with sunlight, and the library has two floors with every book that you can use in your college life. There are grounds and equipment for every sport. I didn't spend much time in the hostel, so I can't tell much about that; all I know is that there are hostels for girls and boys on campus.

admission_overview.college_name: Noble University Courses Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria & Dates

reviews.review_heading: Noble University is a success for career.
reviews.review_text: Noble University has a very large infrastructure in Junagadh. The infrastructure facilities like canteen, transportation, hospital and hostels are absolutely good. They provide the best quality food in the canteen and other facilities like the sports ground are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Noble University, Junagadh review, 2017-2020.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, lab, cafe, canteen, tea post, library, ground, and auditorium are available. The quality of canteen and cafeteria are best,  with a rating of 9/10 for food at mess and hostel. Medical facilities are rated 4 stars out of 5. Sports and games are played every year at college. Sports instruments are already available like football, cricket kit, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and faculty members are supportive.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides hostel facilities for girls as well as boys. And the hostel facilitates with 2-bed and 4-bed, AC and non-AC. It provides the option to live in a hostel with these facilities. The hostel mess is good compared to others in that area, and the hostel also provides the sports ground and sports facility to their students.

reviews.review_heading: Review about noble campus.
reviews.review_text: The university's infrastructure is so giant that all kinds of services can be availed in one place. Additionally, there is a branch of Syndicate Bank on campus, so there are no worries about banking for hostel students. The library has enough space to accommodate 150 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: RP's review on Noble University.
reviews.review_text: The classes, library, grounds for sports, and labs for science students are great and among the best in the city. The classrooms are large and filled with sunlight, and the library has two floors with every book that you can use in your college life. There are grounds and equipment for every sport. I didn't spend much time in the hostel, so I can't tell much about that; all I know is that there are hostels for girls and boys on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good atmosphere for students, good placement in 2017.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are average here; the labs and library contain air conditioning and a Wi-Fi system. I didn't stay in the hostel, but according to my friend, the hostel facility is good; the college provides good medical facilities for all students and staff; and the college canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. A huge library is available in our college. Our college provides a decent study room. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess and canteen is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The is the best college for everything like studies, sports, cultural events, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is so good that you can't expect like this in any college it is like your home. The food of the hostel is also like your own home. It never gives you chance to complain about food of the hotel. There are also so many sports activities you can do in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is huge and good. It has 2 to 3 canteens that serve good food and have a big playground. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls. Mess serves tasty food and maintains good hygiene. Bus facilities are provided from various routes at low cost.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for internships, placements, and students.
reviews.review_text: The canteen facilities are superb. The library is huge, so students can study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Overall you can get a good experience here but don't expect much.
reviews.review_text: There is an ayurvedic hospital nearby and an ambulance is also available. The hostel is average and the food served is below average and of poor quality. Students and staff are good. Cleanliness and hygiene are poor around the room. Even the laundry is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: It is a below-average college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good for both boys and girls. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library and classroom are just good. Recently, they build an indoor and outdoor sports complex so you can play 2 hours in a week as per the official time slot. The food served to the students is bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the college at any time. Labs and classrooms are very clean and beautiful, and the classrooms are lighting and clean. Canteen and medical facilities are the best in the college. All facilities like theatre, PPT, etc., are available here.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for just education other activities like sports,cultural event,and placement is poor
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is good and its speed is high. In Computer lab completely working computer but air conditioner is not properly worked. Classroom is good clean and big green board and fans facilities is good. Library is excellent environment but books are in limited numbers And all books are for old syllabus don't updated by college for new course. Hostels rooms are good. Food quality is medium. Medical facilities are good because of medical college in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Noble Group of Institutions, Junagadh.
reviews.review_text: Noble Group of Institution has a great engineering environment, and the best part of our college is our faculty. Students are like a family. Every year, our college organises a group and many events for students.

overview_faqs.question: Is Madhav Institute of Technology and Science a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Madhav Institute of Technology and Science is a reputed institute for B.Tech, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, M.Plan, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Architecture & Planning, IT & Software, Design, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Madhav Institute of Technology and Science has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Madhav Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology(Artificial Intelligence and Robotics) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good initiative in syllabus but more crowded and less placements opportunity.

content.Placements: About placements, the college is average, the placements in the AI department are low, and fewer companies visit in search of branch-specific roles. The roles provided are software engineer, marketing, and similar positions, and about 30 to 40 percent of students generally get placements.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are good, but the playground with the hostel is not provided, nor is there a common room to play table games and other indoor games. The food sometimes doesn’t seem good in taste, but generally it’s decent, and hostel timings are an issue because we are prohibited from leaving the hostel after 7:30.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfy about the extracurricular activities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 40 percent of students are placed, with the highest package around 40 LPA and the lowest 6 LPA. The top company being Infosys, and I have no idea about the roles or the percentage of students who got internships in my branch.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are great, and the infrastructure is also amazing, with AC in the new buildings. Very advanced and clean labs, medical facilities, regular sports activities, and a canteen whose food is not that great.
content.Faculty: Most of the teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable, with an effective way of teaching. A very relevant curriculum that makes us industry-ready, and exams that are moderate with relative marking so very few students fail.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in all in infrastructure, curriculum, academics and placement.

content.Placements: The placement depends on the students hard work and the college reputation as this year Infosys company came to our college and took 30 students for a job. The minimum package is 3 to 4 LPA and the maximum package is 7 to 8 LPA. Many other companies also came for placement depends on students skills and projects.
content.Infrastructure: The labs of our college are well maintain and there are two lab instructors for every lab as the college inaugurated a new building and named it the AI building. Laboratory classes are attended regularly and students also do their best hardware projects and there are so many machines.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Internet of Things(IOT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: In the labs, they have gaming PCs, and I like them.

content.Placements: The average package of the recruiters is 3.5 LPA, 5 LPA, 7 LPA, 8 LPA, not much more, and top recruiters TCS and Infosys, some other companies, not with big names. The percentage of students placed is 50 to 60 percent. The highest package is11 LPA or 15 LPA, depending on the new company.
content.Infrastructure: Every lab has an Ethernet connection and a well-built monitor, and also has Wi-Fi, some classrooms also have ACs, but all the labs are well-built with every facility possible.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified and have done Ph.D. from NITs and IITs, and have extensive experience in teaching quality, which also shows their experience in the school curriculum is good. Semester exams in this college are not too difficult. Passing is if you get 18 out of 50, you are passed. The facilities for this course are from IITS and NITS, and there are Ph.D. and very experienced instructors in terms of teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a decent college as compared to the private colleges I see this college as a good option.

content.Placements: The packages of the college are not so good. Mainly companies like TCS are coming, and they are offering a little more than the lower branches are suffering most. CSE department students are more likely getting packages like 5 LPA, which is pretty less compared to the fee they are taking for the courses.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and college is good as we see new AI department labs are also working fine. Therefore, if we talk about the old building where mainly the branches like Mechanical, Civil, and CSE are located, the core branches' infrastructure is okay, but the biggest lacking issue is the internet. The Wi-Fi in the college and hostel is not working fine, whether we are talking about inside classrooms or in the hostel.

content.Placements: 105 students are in our batch. The average package is 1.5 lakh, and while some students got internships, the college does not provide them. We get a degree in B Pharmacy and a license for opening a medical store. The B Pharmacy course is good.

individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college, and I suggest you take admission to this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides the best facilities and good faculty members.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The salary package offered by Byju's is 1.2 LPA. A top recruiting company of our college is Byju's. Companies like Tata, Mahindra, Plant, etc., visit our college to hire students for an internship.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied only with the degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are neat and clean. But labs don't have the latest practical apparatus and gadgets, especially Chemistry and Physics labs. Sports facilities are available, and the ground is also available for students to practice football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides everything at a low fee structure.

Everything is available in the canteen, and our college also conducts many games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the Faculties and facilities but absolutely dissatisfied with non-relevant course.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides the best placements in Chhattisgarh.

But the college arranges private hostels for girls. The college also provides bus facilities to reach the college from outer areas.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college. Placements were not good.

reviews.review_heading: College is great for those students who want to learn something.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, provided with a Wi-Fi facility around the campus. Labs are well-maintained, and the library is well-furnished with the availability of books of different subjects. Classrooms are provided with a projector and smartboard. Food served by the college canteen is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good. There are a sufficient number of systems for 30- 35 students. Each lab has at least that number of systems or even more. Classrooms are good, each having the capacity of 80 students. The sports room is not huge but is quite good. There are a badminton court, volleyball court and a cricket ground. In the cricket ground, you can also play football. The sports room has some indoor games like chess, carrom and table tennis. Quality of food is quite good. Hostel rooms are good and smal...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Labs were moderate. The library was not very good. Food served in the mess was very bad. The hostel is located at a long distance from the city. Quality of food was not good. Medical facilities were not available. Hostel rooms were very hot during the summer season.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college as there are placements, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Labs are well maintained, and the library is also good with all the contents needed. The best part is the sports facilities. The canteen is not good, but the hostel rooms are okay. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Only a few people got placed, I think it was only 10% or less. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Many of them got internships during our course in different companies. The roles offered are quite simple and are suitable for freshers, such as salesmen, marketers, promoters, and those who have also done their internship in packaging.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite bad, you don't get Wi-Fi for B.Com, only for BCU students, even the computer labs are for BCU, and even if you have an elective in computer, you cannot use the labs. Classrooms are very congested, with 4 to 5 students sitting on a bench. The library is very small, so not even 20 students can sit at a time. The canteen is also bad, you don't get anything, only samosas, chips, and biscuits.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: College has good teaching staff and very supportive.

content.Placements: The percentage of campus placement was high. We had a good reputed companies like, Google, Infosys, Wirpo, Embassy, and Sagility. Minimum 40% of students got internships at top companies. They got main posts as team workers, team leaders, manager posts, and filled executive in other companies like Aditya Birla and Bajaj Finance.
content.Infrastructure: College had good facilities, faculty, and teaching staff. College also had a good library with lots of books.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good education and placements.

content.Placements: Students from above 60% and above are placed. The package is started from 2.8 LPA. The highest salary is 9.3 LPA. Top companies that recruited are TCS, Infosys, and L&T. The top job roles are data analyst, business analyst, python developer, and Java developer.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very good infrastructure which is comfortable for students to adapt themselves to the environment to study well. Hostel is good and the food too. We can completely rely on the food they give us in the hostel because it is tasty and good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the connectivity with the teachers and good placements.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students get placed in the B.Com course. The average package offered is approximately 4 LPA. Almost all students got internship opportunities from companies like Tension. The top roles offered are HR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are really good. Classrooms are good which include AV projectors and other basic necessities. The library is the greatest part of the college with all different kinds of books and with very good study environment. We did not have any access to Wi-Fi as smartphones are prohibited in the college.

faqs.question: Does Seshadripuram College accepts BBA course fees in form of EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes, Seshadripuram college accepts BBA course fee via EMI method. Students can make payment in instalments for the course. In case of any problems, they can contact the admissions department for quick resolution. They must keep in mind to meet the minimum eligibility criteria before making the BBA fee payment.

faqs.question: Does Seshadripuram College accepts online fee payment for BBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the college accepts online payment gateways for fees payment. These are Canara bank, Google Pay, and Phone Pay. It makes the Seshadripuram College BBA course fee payment process flexible and easier for students. The fees must be paid within the deadline on the official website of the college.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission into BBA course at Seshadripuram College?
faqs.answer: Students who wants to pursue BBA from Seshadripuram College must pass class 12 in commerce field. Admission into the BBA course is made on the basis of merit. The college considers CBSE, ICSE and Karnataka PUC for admissions. Students must apply on the official website of the college.

faqs.question: What is the process to receive offer letter for BBA course at Seshadripuram College?
faqs.answer: The students must fill the application form with correct details. They must fulfil all the criteria necessary for Seshadripuram College BBA course admissions. In case of any issues, students must reach out to admissions department for more details. If the students meet all the required criteria, they are given the final offer letter.

faqs.question: Does Seshadripuram College fills vacant BBA seats via direct admission?
faqs.answer: No, the college strictly offers seat in BBA course on the basis of merit. It never allocates seats directly to any candidate. This is against Seshadripuram College policies and guidelines. Students looking to get admission into BBA course, must follow the set criteria for seat allocation.

faqs.question: Can students get direct admission into Seshadripuram College for BBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, students can get direct admission into BBA course at Seshadripuram College. They must pass class 12 with minimum of 60% marks from either of these boards; CBSE 12, ICSE, and Karnataka PUC. They must fill the application form from the official website of college.

faqs.question: How are seats allocated to students in BBA course at Seshadripuram College?
faqs.answer: The seats are given on the basis of merit for BBA course. There is no reservation quota for seat distribution. Students who have completed class 12 from commerce background, are only eligible for BBA course seat. The final list is released on Seshadripuram College website and their notice board.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is superb. The faculty is trained, and the placement cell is average.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available only in the computer lab. Classrooms are equipped with full facilities such as a smartboard. There is an excellent library filled with books. There are no hostel facilities. The canteen, sports, and games are also quite decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is quite bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite bad, you don't get Wi-Fi for B.Com, only for BCU students, even the computer labs are for BCU, and even if you have an elective in computer, you cannot use the labs. Classrooms are very congested, with 4 to 5 students sitting on a bench. The library is very small, so not even 20 students can sit at a time. The canteen is also bad, you don't get anything, only samosas, chips, and biscuits.

reviews.review_heading: College has good teaching staff and very supportive.
reviews.review_text: College had good facilities, faculty, and teaching staff. College also had a good library with lots of books.

reviews.review_text: It has a very good infrastructure which is comfortable for students to adapt themselves to the environment to study well. Hostel is good and the food too. We can completely rely on the food they give us in the hostel because it is tasty and good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the connectivity with the teachers and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are really good. Classrooms are good which include AV projectors and other basic necessities. The library is the greatest part of the college with all different kinds of books and with very good study environment. reviews.review_heading: Good environment to learn and gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: If I say about infrastructure it has good and hygienic environment with all facilities like library, digital classrooms, and labs. Canteen facilities are poor. Overall, outdoor and indoor sports facilities are available in good environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because our college has a good environment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are very good. It has a good environment. There are xerox shops, food, coffee stalls, metro, etc. The college has good chemistry labs, computer labs, and sports association.

reviews.review_heading: I am amazingly satisfied with everything at my college.
reviews.review_text: The college has a gym, sports room, canteen, and drinking water facilities all over the campus, along with a big quadrangle and Wi-Fi in all four computer labs. The canteen is good, with super taste and affordable prices; the taste is better than other restaurants.

reviews.review_heading: Degree life in Seshadripuram.
reviews.review_text: There are computer labs and library facilities. The college built a new library, which has been nice. There are also medical facilities; there is a doctor on campus, and there are canteen facilities in the college. We have all types of chips and price batches.

reviews.review_heading: Seshadripuram college: placement, facilities, and fee.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are semi-furnished with good tables and desks. Every classroom has a smart board to provide visual teaching for better understanding. Library facilities are good, and all related books are available in our college library. Medical and canteen facilities are available with affordable and clean food.

reviews.review_heading: My college life was absolutely amazing.
reviews.review_text: Seshadripuram College has the best infrastructure facilities where we can excel our skills to the best, and there are two library facilities for B.Com. and B.BA. students and a separate library for BCA students to make use of the best resources. We are even provided with a digital library for making use of the internet and gaining knowledge on extra courses like advanced Excel, Tally Prime, and stock market courses, and every classroom has advanced digital screens for representing the topics and...

reviews.review_heading: Lack of placements and teaching facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good and the facilities were also okay. But the main thing is teachers don't use business labs often. Compared to other labs or courses. There wasn't hostel facilities available as the college was in the city centre and mostly all the students were in and around the city itself. Medical facilities were good regarding first aid and there used to always ambulance available in the campus for any emergency. Sports and games were organised according but there wasn't chances to all ...

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: I would like to give 4 stars because our college infrastructure like the gym, sports room, and library is very useful for us and I have utilised it a lot. When coming to our classroom, it is very good and clean. Even we have a projector in our class and in other classes too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and great campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our campus is clean. Hostel facility is not provided but many PGs are available near our college. Our canteen serves delicious and hygienic food items. Many students from our college have participated in state and national-level sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our College is good for artists.
reviews.review_text: Classes are good and well-equipped but there is no projector in classes. Computer lab is well equipped with computers with many knowledgeable software installed. Our College library is well-equipped with many knowledgeable books for all the courses.
